name: codex-hub
description: Codex CLI TUI HUD patch and installer for context, short-window usage, weekly usage, and live status.

interface.shortDescription: Show a compact Codex HUD below the input box.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex CLI TUI HUD surface that renders context, rolling usage, weekly usage, model, directory, branch, and run state from live Codex runtime data.
defaultPrompt: Explain the Codex Hub HUD fields
